name: Braixen
description:
You have been disowned by your wealthy family, and left with nothing but a rebellious Braixen to mentor you on your journey.


Introduction 1: Original introduction. Under table footjob.

Introduction 2: Braixen expressing her disdain

Introduction 3: Just left the family mansion and about to start your journey.

Introduction 4: You've just won your first pokemon battle and Braixen intends to reward your efforts.

Introduction 5: NTR. The head of the crest uses Braixen one last time before your exile.

Introduction 6: Potential NTR, first tournament with Braixen.
creator: Iceskull
